topic_intro.text: Java is a powerful programming language used to build mobile apps, websites, games, backend servers, banking systems, and enterprise software. It is one of the most popular languages in the world because Java programs can run on different operating systems using the JVM.

why_learn_this: Java is used in Android app development
Large companies use Java for backend systems
Java is beginner-friendly and widely taught
Learning Java helps understand object-oriented programming
Java developers are in high demand

basic_terms.meaning: JVM stands for Java Virtual Machine. It allows Java programs to run on Windows, Mac, and Linux without changing the code.
JDK stands for Java Development Kit. It contains tools needed to write and run Java programs.
A compiler converts Java code into bytecode that the JVM can understand.

syntax.title: Hello World Program

explanations.text: public class Main creates a class named Main.
main() is the starting point of every Java program.
System.out.println() is used to print output on the screen.
Curly braces {} are used to define blocks of code.

practice: Install Java JDK on your computer
Install IntelliJ IDEA or VS Code
Change the printed message to your name

quiz.question: Which function is used to print output?
What is the starting method of a Java program?

revision_summary.text: Java is a cross-platform programming language used in many real-world applications. JVM allows Java code to run on multiple operating systems. Every Java program starts from the main() method.
